body:
# PULL REQUEST

Update Convex package dependencies, without fixing Sparse EKI brittleness issues.
title: Update Convex dependency -- without SparseEKI fix

body:
# PULL REQUEST

## Purpose and Content

Updates Convex and SCS dependencies to track the latest minor versions of the packages, which enables the CompatHelper to do its job.
title: Update Convex and SCS to latest version.
